queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: delay in paying off previous credits.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with delay in paying off previous credits and their contribution to increased default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of savings below 100 DM on credit risk mitigation and default avoidance.
